metadata.title: Feel So Close (Extended Mix)
metadata.lyrics:

[01:23.27] I wear my heart upon my sleeve, like a big deal
[01:30.73] Your love pours down on me, surrounds me like a waterfall
[01:38.20] And there's no stopping us right now
